title: trachelospermum assamense
intro: Trachelospermum assamense, also known as Assam jasmine, is a flowering evergreen climbing plant native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Trachelospermum assamense include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
